text: Hello. Hello. Hi. This is Samantha with U.S. medical supplies. Hope I caught you at a good time. Five million. I'm calling about the continuous glucose monitor. It lets you track your blood sugar without pricking your finger. I haven't got to get diabetes. Do you have diabetes? No. I just said. That's good. Take care now.
